## Discussion

When importing or exporting a key, if you set the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecKeyImportExportFlags/securePassphrase] flag bit, you can optionally use this field to specify a string for the prompt that appears in the password panel.

# alertPrompt

**Instance Property**

The prompt to display in the secure passphrase alert panel.

## Declaration

```swift
var alertPrompt: Unmanaged<CFString>?
```

## Discussion

When importing or exporting a key, if you set the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecKeyImportExportFlags/securePassphrase] flag bit, you can optionally use this field to specify a string for the prompt that appears in the password panel.
title: alertPrompt
